overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA: Vice City showing the player character walking along a neon-lit Ocean Drive style street at night. The weather transitions from clear to heavy rain as the character passes art deco hotels and palm trees.

events.description: yellow taxi drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the Deacon Hotel neon sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall art deco building with green neon signage reading DEACON HOTEL
art deco building with vertical yellow neon light strips
tall palm trees lining the grassy area beside the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player character walks along a neon-lit sidewalk at night, passing the green-lit Deacon Hotel on the left. A yellow taxi drives by on the street as the character approaches a pedestrian in a brown jacket.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past palm trees and distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall modern condominium building visible in the distance
tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving past the Deacon Hotel, the character walks along a palm-lined boulevard with a grassy median. The orange neon building recedes into the distance on the left while tall condominiums rise ahead, and street lamps cast light on the clear night.

events.description: heavy rain begins suddenly, reducing visibility and wetting all surfaces
ego stops walking and stands still to observe the rainy street traffic

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain then stopping on the sidewalk to look around at traffic

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and purple top walks past the camera
black sedan driving through the rain with headlights on

segments.scene_description: Heavy rain suddenly begins to fall, obscuring the distant buildings and wetting the streets. The character continues walking briefly then stops to stand on the sidewalk, watching cars drive through the downpour while pedestrians hurry past.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a neon-lit coastal boulevard that transforms from a clear night into a heavy downpour. It begins with the character walking past the green-lit Deacon Hotel as a yellow taxi drives by and a pedestrian in a brown jacket appears on the sidewalk. As the camera moves forward, the orange neon of the hotel recedes into the distance, giving way to a palm-lined boulevard with a grassy median and towering condominiums under a clear sky. The scene then shifts abruptly as heavy rain begins to fall, obscuring the distant architecture and wetting the pavement. Finally, the character comes to a halt on the sidewalk, watching cars drive through the sudden deluge while other pedestrians hurry past in the rain.
